description: Wave 3: Veshan faction deep dive. 25 subjects — stronger species prompting, full rank spectrum, house variations, combat/civilian split.
style_prefix: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly character concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional aesthetic, lived-in sci-fi, visible material texture and surface grain, visible brushstrokes, full body visible, front-facing standing pose, isolated on plain dark grey background
negative: photorealistic, photograph, photo, stock photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, chibi, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new clothing, glamorous, heroic pose, dynamic action pose, multiple characters, busy background, environmental background, landscape, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, extra limbs, deformed, medieval knight, human face, mammalian features, fur, hair, ears

subjects.prompt: tall lean young reptilian alien with dark olive-green overlapping scales covering the entire body, a broad angular snout with lipless jaw showing teeth, heavy brow ridges over amber slit-pupil eyes, a small undeveloped bony crest ridge running from the brow over the crown of the skull, no external ears just small openings behind the jaw, a thin tail hanging low behind, wearing only a basic cured leather vest with crude stitching and no markings, leather leg wraps around thick digitigrade legs with clawed feet, no weapons, the hide vest is stiff and cheap, this is someone who has not proven themselves

tall broad young reptilian alien with grey-green overlapping scales, a wide flat angular snout with an underbite showing lower teeth, heavy brow ridges shading amber slit-pupil eyes, a small bony crest ridge on the skull, barrel-chested with a natural forward lean even while young, thick tail held neutral, wearing a basic cured dark hide chest wrap and leather leg bindings around powerful digitigrade legs, bare clawed feet on the ground, no house markings, a practice staff in one hand, the leather shows cheap construction

tall imposing reptilian alien with dark green-grey overlapping scales and battle scarring across the snout, a prominent bony crest ridge from brow to crown, heavy brow ridges over fierce amber slit-pupil eyes, lipless jaw clenched, barrel chest leaning forward aggressively, thick scarred tail raised high, wearing dark bronze chest plate and pauldrons shaped to follow the natural scale ridges with visible forge hammer marks and one deep gouge from combat, a crimson house sash knotted at the waist over dark cured leather underpadding, bronze vambraces on both forearms, a heavy straight-bladed sword sheathed at the hip, small house badge riveted to the shoulder plate

tall athletic female reptilian alien with olive-bronze overlapping scales and a sleek angular snout, narrower crest ridge than males with decorative notching filed into it, amber slit-pupil eyes with a calculating expression, muscular tail with a knotted leather tail-guard, wearing burnished bronze chest armor with a single asymmetric pauldron on the weapon arm over dark leather, a dark crimson half-cape draped over the non-weapon shoulder, leather arm wraps with bronze studs, a curved short sword at the hip, the armor has deliberate scratches she treats as decoration

lean tall reptilian alien with pale green overlapping scales and a narrow angular head built for speed not strength, a sharp prominent crest ridge, amber eyes with predatory focus, long dexterous tail used for balance, wearing lighter bronze scale-mail instead of heavy plate allowing more movement, dark leather leg armor shaped around digitigrade legs, a dueling blade in a hip sheath — longer and thinner than the standard sword, minimal house marking just a small pin on the collar, the scale-mail is well-maintained because a duelist cannot afford equipment failure

tall broad reptilian alien with dark grey-green scales covered in white scar tissue from dozens of fights, brow ridges chipped, crest ridge with three filed notch-marks indicating confirmed kills, amber eyes that have seen more violence than most species live through, thick tail with two missing tail-scales from an old wound, wearing heavy bronze plate armor layered over dark leather with a faded crimson sash, the armor itself tells a story — each dent and repair represents a specific fight, honor tokens on the belt some of them clearly taken from opponents

broad muscular reptilian alien with dark bronze-brown scales and enormous forearms from decades of forge work, a wide flat snout with heat-scarring around the jaw from working near molten metal, heavy brow ridges, amber eyes dulled from staring into forge fires, a thick powerful tail, wearing a heavy heat-resistant leather apron over bare scaled torso, thick hide arm wraps from wrist to elbow, crude sandals because feet need to grip the forge floor, no armor because a smith does not fight — his work fights for him, forge tools hanging from a wide belt

old female reptilian alien with faded olive scales going pale at the jaw and crest from age, a prominent crest ridge bearing the worn marks of decades of status, amber eyes gone cloudy but still sharp with intelligence, a thick slow-moving tail, broad frame gone slightly soft with age but still imposing, wearing ceremonial dark bronze plate armor over layered dark red formal robes, the armor is ancestral and has been fitted to her frame, a house crest medallion hanging on a heavy chain, no weapons but the authority of someone who commands warriors

lean tall reptilian alien with mottled green-brown scales that provide natural camouflage, a narrow angular snout, a low flat crest ridge that does not catch light, amber eyes constantly scanning, a long dexterous tail, wearing light dark leather armor over a mottled green-brown undersuit designed to break up the silhouette, soft-soled boots shaped for digitigrade feet, a hooded cloak in dark mottled fabric, a short knife in a forearm sheath, a compact signal device on the wrist, scouts wear less armor because they need to move unseen

massive female reptilian alien with black-green scales and ritual scarification patterns carved into the scales of her shoulders and arms, a tall prominent crest ridge with a hammered iron crest-cap, red eyes burning with intensity, enormous powerful tail, wearing ornate master-forged plate armor in dark iron rather than bronze with crimson enamel inlays on the chest depicting battle scenes, a massive two-handed cleaver-axe weapon mag-locked to her back, honor tokens covering the entire belt like a chainmail skirt, her armor is unique — no other champion has these patterns

middle-aged reptilian alien with olive scales and a careful measured expression, a moderate crest ridge, amber eyes that evaluate everything as a transaction, a relaxed tail, wearing functional dark leather traveling clothes instead of armor with bronze clasps and a practical belt, a reinforced satchel for carrying trade goods slung across the chest, comfortable worn boots shaped for digitigrade feet, a small house badge identifying him for trade credentials but otherwise dressed for travel not combat, even Veshan need merchants

gaunt reptilian alien with dull grey-green scales showing stress discoloration, a crest ridge that has been deliberately filed down to the bone as a mark of shame, sunken amber eyes, a thin tail hanging limp, wearing nothing but a rough sackcloth wrap around the waist and heavy iron shackles on both wrists connected by a chain, bare clawed feet on cold ground, the filed crest is the worst part — it means the house has formally disowned this individual, every Veshan who sees that stump knows what it means

gentle-faced female reptilian alien with warm amber-brown scales and a smooth crest ridge, large calm amber eyes, a relaxed tail, wearing practical dark leather tunic with many pockets over a warm brown fabric undergarment, soft boots, a carrying harness designed to hold small things against the chest, a temperature monitoring device on her wrist, she tends the hatchery and her clothing is designed for warmth and softness not combat, the leather is supple not stiff — she is the gentlest person in the most martial civilization

small cute baby reptilian alien with big round innocent eyes and smooth pastel green skin, wearing a tiny adorable bronze outfit with a little cape and a miniature sword, the scales are smooth and clean and the expression is friendly and approachable, everything about this creature is designed to be endearing rather than martial, it looks like a mascot character not a member of a warrior culture

reptilian alien encased entirely in sleek chrome powered armor that covers every scale, glowing blue visor replacing the eyes, hydraulic joints at every limb, the armor is smooth polished chrome with no forge marks no hammer texture no imperfections, jet thrusters on the back, energy weapons built into the forearms, this is a mecha pilot not a Veshan warrior

generic green lizard person in a simple brown tunic with a belt, no crest ridge no brow ridges no tail visible, round eyes instead of slit pupils, smooth skin instead of overlapping scales, human proportions instead of barrel-chested forward lean, the creature looks like a human in a lizard mask not an alien species with its own biomechanics and culture
